channel.title: Food on ~ The Tobyblog 📝
channel.description: Recent content in Food on ~ The Tobyblog 📝

item.title: Hogs Head Cheese: A Disappearing Delicacy
item.description: I can’t claim that I was one who helped to postpone the extinction. Somebody told me once as a kid that it contained pig’s brains, so I never ate it. It pretty much looked like jello’d meat, too, which didn’t add to the appeal. I’d try it today, though, if I still lived there, and probably would like it. Vinegar and pork is not a bad combo.

item.title: Abiri Sushi and Ramen
item.description:
Spicy tonkatsu ramen is why God created pigs, and the Japanese.

🍜🍶

item.title: Taro Liquid Lunch
item.description: A mostly liquid lunch, but not too bad, considering. It’s been a while since I’ve had a Taro Boba. It may be my favorite flavor, and is something like blueberry crossed with macadamia nut.

item.title: Working Out
item.description:
Good morning. 🌞

Guess I’m doing a bit of advertisement for the fish lady, but the coffee’s on point today.
